scope: zero-training held-out non-inferiority qualification of reverse-SDE-50 against reverse-SDE-100 for coordinate-only oracle-context audits

held_out_panel.selection: take the first 512 entries of the candidate permutation after exact exclusion of every prior-panel index

sampling.condition_order: forward on even batches and reversed on odd batches
sampling.latency_measurement: CUDA-synchronized full coordinate rollouts with initialization and host-to-device transfer excluded

brownian_coupling.definition: for variances h>m>l, z_coarse=a*z_first+b*z_second with a^2=l(h-m)/(m(h-l)) and b^2=h(m-l)/(m(h-l)); terminal l=0 has zero bridge noise
brownian_coupling.rationale: this is the measure-preserving nesting for the production ancestral Brownian-bridge kernel; unweighted Euler increment addition would change the active solver

bootstrap.wasserstein: exact one-dimensional empirical W1 after paired structure resampling

decision_rule.pass: qualify reverse-SDE-50 only as the default solver for subsequent coordinate-only audits on this checkpoint class; a future qualified joint checkpoint requires a new full-hybrid NFE Gate
decision_rule.fail: retain reverse-SDE-100 for coordinate-only audits and stop sampler search
decision_rule.boundary: No result changes the failed H1a conclusion, qualifies free generation, changes the full production hybrid NFE, or authorizes H1b-H6, tensor conditioning, oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT. After this Gate, sampler search stops and the exposure-conditioned topology persistence audit resumes.
